metadata.name: SN Refsdal
metadata.notes: Kelly et al. 2023, ApJ 948, 93. Time delays from Table 15 'Combined' method. Flux ratios from photometric analysis. S1-S4 form an Einstein cross; SX is a separate host arc image ~8 arcsec away, appearing ~376 days after S1.

magnification_proxies.note: Total flux ratios (F_i / F_ref) used as relative magnification proxies. Values from Kelly+2023 photometric analysis. Absolute magnifications uncertain; ratios are robust.

metadata.name: SN H0pe
metadata.notes: Pierel et al. 2024 (ApJ 967, 50). Photometric time delays and magnifications from JWST light-curve analysis.

metadata.name: SN Encore
metadata.notes: Pierel et al. 2026 (ApJ, arXiv:2509.12301). Table 5 final systematic-corrected delay.

metadata.name: SN 2025wny
metadata.notes: Johansson et al. 2025, ApJ 995, L17; Taubenberger et al. 2025 (HOLISMOKES XIX). First lensed SLSN-I. Four images in Einstein cross pattern. Host galaxy PS1J0716+3821 known quadruple since Cañameras et al. 2020. Time delays not yet measured. HST (PID 17611) and JWST (PID 5564) follow-up ongoing (PI: Goobar). High magnification contrast makes this the most promising future TEP test after Refsdal.

time_delays_days.note: Not yet measured. Ongoing photometric monitoring by Maidanak, Lulin, COLIBRI, Wendelstein. HST/JWST follow-up scheduled.

post_hoc_predictions.reference: Witt-Wynne model, Wynne & Schechter 2018, as applied in arXiv:2605.11090. NOTE: post-hoc, not blind.

magnification_proxies.note: Very high magnification contrast expected. If mu_A ~ 20-50 and other images are mu ~ 1-5, contrast ratio could exceed 10x, comparable to Refsdal S4-SX.

monitoring_status.priority_for_tep: HIGH — 4 images, high magnification contrast, long baseline (~175 d predicted)

metadata.name: SN Eos
metadata.notes: Coulter et al. 2026 (arXiv). Multiply-imaged Type II SN at z=5.13, discovered by VENUS in JWST/NIRCam imaging. Two confirmed images. Farthest spectroscopically confirmed SN ever discovered. Not viable for loop-closure TEP test (only 2 images). VENUS lens model (arXiv:2602.14074) available but no blind time-delay predictions.

time_delays_days.note: Not yet measured. Only two images confirmed; no delay measurement possible yet.

magnification_proxies.note: Magnification not yet measured from light curves.

monitoring_status.priority_for_tep: LOW — only 2 images, no loop closure possible
